subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! God willing, mayest thou attain, through the loving-kindness of the Best-Beloved of the worlds, and drink from the ocean of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین انشاء الله بعنایت محبوب عالم فائز باشی و از دریای فضلش بیاشامی جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
